<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/engines"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of inference engines

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"base_model","in":"query","description":"Filter engines by base model","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"task_type","in":"query","description":"Filter engines by task type","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"List of Inference Engine's summary object.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Inference Engine Summary","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"engine-12345","description":"The unique identifier for the inference engine"},"name":{"type":"string","example":"inference-test-engine"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["Creating","Active","Inactive"],"example":"Creating"},"base_model":{"type":"string","example":"Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct"},"server_type":{"type":"string","example":"on-demand"},"task_type":{"type":"string","example":"text-generation"},"deployment_counts":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"Number of deployments on this inference engine"},"created_at":{"type":"integer","example":1633036800,"description":"The timestamp when the deployment was created"}},"title":"InferenceEngineSummary"}}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","error"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","example":401},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"}},"title":"ApiErrorUnauthorized"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
